spec_match.rationale: Concepts exercise the exact current surface as established by the WICG explainer (proposal text, not a standard) and Chromium main's experimental implementation binding (performance.idl + speculation_data/speculation_navigation_data/preload_data/preconnect_data.idl): the getSpeculations() instance method and its four members (inspector), the preloads-only used/null consumed signal with correct at-read-time semantics and an explicit final-lifecycle-vs-BFCache distinction (auditor/beacon), rules injection with navigations readback (lab), and the explainer's pagehide+keepalive collection pattern (beacon). Neither explainer nor code is presented as normative or shipped.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive real behavior: live method calls with honest unavailable fallbacks (inspector/auditor/lab), real preload links and fetch-to-consume rows (auditor), real speculationrules injection with support detection (lab), and a genuinely-registered pagehide handler fired on demand with an unwired-route preview that is never fired (beacon).

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index lede now scopes the consumed flag to preloads (no longer claims every speculation carries one), the beacon card cites the explainer rather than a nonexistent spec, and 'why it shipped' is now 'why it's proposed' with the current-document/cross-origin data boundary and the destination-URL provisionality stated.

edge_cases.rationale: Fixed the independently-observed defects: sample crossorigin:null is now 'none' (CrossOriginMode is a non-null enum); navigationDestinationURL absence is documented as null, never undefined; the navigations type comment includes prerender-until-script; the inspector's preload-links claim is conditional on an enabled implementation; and used===null is now explained as 'not consumed at read time', definitive waste only when the page lifetime actually ends (preload_data.cc: used_time_ optional → null); pagehide's event.persisted BFCache case is retained in the beacon payload. The lab deliberately keeps its builder to prefetch|prerender because the rules-JSON spelling prerender_until_script vs the IDL enum's hyphenated form is unverifiable in this flag-off environment.

references.rationale: Index cites chromestatus.com/feature/5118840377835520, the WICG explainer, MDN's Speculation Rules API guide, and the Chrome prerender docs; suite and critique cite the exact Chromium IDL files and the direct chromestatus API (updated 2026-06-05: OT desktop 150–155, origin_trial_id 2748884622556266497, ship estimate unset, status 'Proposed', spec_link None).

conformance.rationale: New immutable root suite (this cycle, 7 assertions): host object, instance-method typeof, not-a-static-on-constructor, stale performance.speculations property-form absence, SpeculationData return shape, navigationDestinationURL null-not-undefined, and preload used-field shape — all flag-on observable where the surface is gated, all honest fail-off elsewhere, none auto-invoking the method (checks are typeof/shape only, getSpeculations() is only called inside flag-on branches). Executes live at /v150/speculative-load-measurement/conformance/.

runtime_evidence.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp on desktop Chrome stable (2026-07-24): all visible controls exercised at 1280×800 and 390×844 — inspector call button (honest unavailable fallback + corrected reference shape), auditor consume/reset/read cycles (own-bookkeeping fallback labelled), lab build/inject/read/clear cycles (support detection + reference labelling), beacon fire/preview (empty payload marked, unwired route never fired), zero console errors and zero failed requests.

telemetry_health.rationale: Concepts emit showcaseTelemetry.assert events per branch (probe state, live/unavailable/threw, preload consumed, lab sr-support/injected/live-read/fallback, beacon payload-built/previewed); telemetry POSTs returned 202 during validation.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables throughout, button background+color pairs, focus-visible outlines, no static-card pattern; this cycle's edits were copy/data-literal level and preserve layout.

accessibility.rationale: aria-live on every report/output region, labelled selects/inputs, aria-label on the resource table and per-row consume buttons, disabled states exposed; reference-vs-live is text-labelled, not color-only.

mobile_desktop_parity.rationale: Matrix pass: all five pages scrollWidth equals viewport at 1280×800 and 390×844 with every interactive state exercised; buttons measure ≈45px, grids collapse as designed.

openQuestions.title: Re-derive surface and copy when the explainer, IDL, or OT status next changes
openQuestions.detail: Copy is provenanced to the 2026-07-24 fetch of the direct chromestatus API (updated 2026-06-05) and Chromium main's experimental implementation binding. The explainer keeps an open TODO on the destination-URL exposure shape, and the stale performance.speculations metadata lineage is recorded as inference (the rejected early property form), not provenance. If a published spec link appears, the explainer's TODO resolves, the OT ends (after Chrome 155), or the IDL changes, re-derive the family copy and re-run the suite.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region announcements for dynamic probe/status results after button activation
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic state through live regions tied to the activating control; keep semantic tables and named controls.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Verified applied across all four concepts (aria-live report regions observed updating; labelled controls; text-labelled reference-vs-live states).

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible form controls selects checkboxes and labeled inputs in interactive demo pages
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Associate labels with every input/select and expose state changes programmatically.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Verified applied: the lab's builder fields are all labelled; auditor row buttons carry per-resource aria-labels; outputs announce through aria-live.

summary: Source-review of the Speculative load measurement family against the WICG explainer (proposal, not a standard) and Chromium main's experimental implementation binding: fixed the independently-observed defects — sample crossorigin:null → 'none' (non-null enum), navigationDestinationURL absence documented as null not undefined, navigations type comment now includes prerender-until-script, and the inspector's preload-links claim is conditional on an enabled implementation; corrected the preloads-only scope of the used flag on the index, renamed 'why it shipped' to 'why it's proposed' with the current-document/cross-origin boundary and the destination-URL provisionality (explainer TODO) stated, and made the used===null semantics timing-exact (not-consumed-at-read-time versus definitive waste only at a real lifecycle end, with pagehide BFCache entry recorded separately; verified against preload_data.cc). Added the immutable root suite (7 assertions; the feature's method-not-property and null-not-undefined traps encoded). Missing-suite denominator 12→11 expected (787/798).
